mnemonics: EIGENSPACE: Every Instance Gives Entire Null Space After Subtracting λ
EIGEN: Every Invisible Ghost (Eigenvector) Needs Space (Eigenspace) to Appear
keyPoints: An eigenspace E_λ is the set of all eigenvectors corresponding to an eigenvalue λ, plus the zero vector
E_λ is a subspace of the vector space V, specifically the null space of (T - λI)
The dimension of E_λ is the geometric multiplicity of λ, which is always ≤ the algebraic multiplicity
commonMistakes: Forgetting to include the zero vector when describing the eigenspace
Assuming geometric multiplicity always equals algebraic multiplicity
